extraction.one_line_summary: CICCONE attacked inside 500m on Vall de Núria summit finish after CHAVES solo move was caught, winning three-up sprint ahead of ROGLIČ
tactical_patterns: BAHRAIN team set infernal pace destroying field including CARAPAZ, then LANDA attacked but couldn't sustain leader payback.
CHAVES descended aggressively at 14% gradient taking corners fast after summit attack, unusual descending-to-survive tactic on summit finish.
EVENEPOEL went wide final corner allowing CICCONE and ROGLIČ to cut inside, cornering position matters even summit finishes.
ALMEIDA unexpectedly finished fifth only 27 seconds down despite field destruction, showing hidden climbing form pre-Giro.

rider_signals.CICCONE Giulio: positive: won from reduced group after Trek lost CATALDO and ELISSONDE earlier, showing individual resilience.
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: negative: attacked to repay Bahrain's pace-setting but cracked before summit, domestique debt couldn't be honored.
rider_signals.CHAVES Esteban: positive: soloed clear late on brutal climb with aggressive descending tactics, caught only inside 500m.
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: negative: dropped badly when Bahrain set pace despite being Ecuadorian champion, form concern.
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: positive: finished fifth only 27 seconds down in rarified air summit finish, unexpected climbing strength.
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: tactical error going wide final corner from winning position, lost sprint despite strongest position.
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: second place maintains race lead, smart positioning after Bahrain did work and EVENEPOEL's cornering error.
rider_signals.ELISSONDE Kenny: negative: abandoned on decisive stage after CATALDO previous day, Trek losing key climbers early.
